logo_prompt_prefix: You will be provided with a horse racetrack name and an image. Determine if the image shows the logo of the racetrack
color_prompt: What is the dominant color of the logo in this image? Only respond with the color name

logo_positive: a logo or wordmark as the main subject of the image
a brand emblem or typographic logo as the primary visual focus
logo_negative: a photograph where the main subject is not a logo, such as people, animals, or action
a candid or landscape image where no logo or wordmark is the primary focus

cascade_form: Stage A sem-join (logo cross-join): distribution-shape prefilter on cos(track,caption); borderline (track,image) pairs sent to BQ AI.IF. Stage B sem-extract (color): cluster Stage A output by image_filename (same image always same color); ONE AI.GENERATE per unique image; propagate color back to all (ID, image) pairs sharing that image

tracks: Oak Tree at Santa Anita Park

cascade.method: Stage A sem-join (q2a) + Stage B sem-extract (cluster by image_filename + 1 AI.GENERATE per cluster)
cascade.stage_a_sql:
SELECT track, uri
    FROM mmqa.q2b_uncertain_pairs
    WHERE AI.IF(
      (CONCAT('You will be provided with a horse racetrack name and an image. Determine if the image shows the logo of the racetrack. Racetrack: ', track, '.'), image),
      connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
cascade.stage_b_sql:
SELECT @uri_0 AS uri, AI.GENERATE(
          ('What is the dominant color of the logo in this image? Only respond with the color name.', ot.ref),
          connection_id => 'us.connection',
          endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
        ).result AS color
        FROM mmqa.images ot
        WHERE ot.uri = @uri_0
